changelog:
Viumo Beta (Public Release)

This version marks the beginning of Viumo's public testing phase.

 Updates:
- Faster and more stable streaming
- Series episodes now supported
- Improved UI and smoother interactions
- General bug fixes and performance improvements

 Beta Notice:
This version is still under active development. Expect minor issues as we refine the system.

 The full Viumo experience is coming soon.
